Annona nymanii, also known as the Annona tree, is a species of flowering plant in the custard apple family (Annonaceae). The health benefits of Annona nymanii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Annona nymanii include annonacin, annonaine, and other alkaloids, which have been found to have neuroprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Annona nymanii are infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension and gastrointestinal issues.
